name: Nielsen Holdings plc
description: Nielsen is a global leader in audience measurement, data, and analytics, dedicated to shaping the future of media. By measuring consumer behavior across all channels and platforms, the company provides clients with trusted intelligence to understand what audiences watch, listen to, and engage with worldwide. Nielsen operates in over 55 markets, leveraging a combination of big data and representative panels to deliver actionable insights. Their solutions empower advertisers, publishers, and content creators to make informed decisions, optimize marketing performance, and connect effectively with diverse audiences in an increasingly complex and fragmented media landscape.
